name: Team Kennedy
subject: Texts from Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900aa/55b66746/2387d34e/80e13ce/1514503166/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | | **Stay in touch, sign up for text alerts:** [SIGN UP](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900aa/55b66746/2387d34e/80e13cf/1514503166/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/")
---
This is a difficult time for every single one of us. And we want you to know we are thinking of you and your family, as we are staying home and being safe.
One thing we have realized is that it's hard to keep up with the news. It's shifting faster than we've ever seen before. So we're launching a real-time text service for you to stay updated on what Joe is fighting for in Congress, how to keep Massachusetts families safe, live videos, and how to support frontline organizations in our community.
**Sign up for our text alerts:**
[SIGN UP](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900aa/55b66746/2387d34e/80e13cf/1514503166/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/")
Alongside Joe, we are working around the clock to ensure you have the information you need on relief packages being passed in D.C., new information from officials, and even some tips on how to pass the time.
Joe wants to ensure he stays connected, even as we are all far apart. That's why every week Joe is going live across social media platforms to keep you updated with critical information about this pandemic, what is going on in Washington, and how he's spending time with Ellie, James, and Lauren.
We hope you'll keep in touch by signing up to receive notifications when Joe has news to share.
Talk soon,
Team Kennedy
**Sign up for text alerts:**
[SIGN UP](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900aa/55b66746/2387d34e/80e13cf/1514503166/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedyforma.com/mobile-alert/")

subject: Facts are stubborn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
__**FACT:**__ Polls show John Hickenlooper leading Cory Gardner and political pundits believe Colorado is our best chance to flip a Senate seat. __**FACT:**__ Our opponent has the full support of Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell -- and they're pouring huge sums of corporate donations into his campaign coffers to help him win this election. __**FACT:**__ Just this last week, McConnell's super PAC booked $5.5 million in TV advertising in Colorado, and we expect them to spend even more money to tear down John Hickenlooper and our campaign. **Please, grassroots donors like you are the only thing standing in the way of Trump and McConnell buying this Senate seat. name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Stay Home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16676100/177421921/-1907457918?refcode=03292020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2M4MTM4Ni04ZTcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p6i6kxrGzKU1ipKJP5Z9omxLTGhnvVEj_l4Xh7e5gCk=)
---
Dear Friend, Stay home. In the 27th minute of his briefing yesterday, President Trump finally got to the point - "...therefore, we will be extending our guidelines to April 30th, to slow the spread..." Stay home. I'm not the world's greatest orator, but I do know that if you've got a point to make, and you want your audience to know it's the most important thing you have to say, you get it out in the first sentence. Stay home. Critiques of the President's oratory skills aside, that one sentence fragment expresses what every American, to the best of our ability, must do. Stay home. Progress is slow. The number of sick people, the number of deaths, will continue to rise. But we are seeing a hint of progress - the growth rate of infections fell yet again yesterday. WE are doing that. WE must not let up. And WE must be prepared for the long haul, as this thing isn't going to simply disappear after April 30th. I'm not going to harangue you about meeting our quarterly fundraising goals. Such things are trivial and unimportant in the current environment. But elections do matter, and we do need your help. We're constantly retooling and re-planning. clean_body: | = Dear Friend, Stay home. In the 27th minute of his briefing yesterday, President Trump finally got to the point - "...therefore, we will be extending our guidelines to April 30th, to slow the spread..." Stay home. I'm not the world's greatest orator, but I do know that if you've got a point to make, and you want your audience to know it's the most important thing you have to say, you get it out in the first sentence. Stay home. Critiques of the President's oratory skills aside, that one sentence fragment expresses what every American, to the best of our ability, must do. Stay home. Progress is slow. The number of sick people, the number of deaths, will continue to rise. But we are seeing a hint of progress - the growth rate of infections fell yet again yesterday. WE are doing that. WE must not let up. And WE must be prepared for the long haul, as this thing isn't going to simply disappear after April 30th. I'm not going to harangue you about meeting our quarterly fundraising goals. Such things are trivial and unimportant in the current environment. But elections do matter, and we do need your help. We're constantly retooling and re-planning. I pledge that we are going to run the lowest cost, most effective campaign possible. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Stay safe, and stay home. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Emily Rybak
subject: Kathy Landing Volunteer Opportunities from Home!
body:
Good Morning,

I hope this email finds you and your family healthy and happy, as we all do what we can to avoid the Coronavirus.

I'm Emily Rybak; and, as the campaign manager for Kathy Landing, I have the honor and responsibility to execute the direct voter contact plan set forth by our senior strategists. It goes without saying that executing the plan has changed quite a bit in the past couple of weeks.

Before detailing the said changes, I want to thank you so much for your support of Kathy and her campaign to win back the First Congressional District for conservatives, families, and sensible solutions. With your continued support, we will ensure Kathy can get to work on the issues most important to us: keeping our economy strong, securing our border and keeping our nation safe, improving our infrastructure, lowering healthcare costs with market-based solutions, and protecting our tax dollars.

Knowing that social distancing is an important action to take to contain the spread of this virus, Kathy and our campaign have suspended all in-person events and door knocking activities for at least the next two weeks. However, Kathy and our team are still working as hard as possible to win.

I am emailing today to share a few ways that you can help our grassroots efforts from the safety and comfort of your home.

Writing Postcards: The message to write is short, simple, and to the point. We would be grateful if you would be able to write as many postcards as you are willing and able to. We will deliver a stack of postcards and the script to write - leaving them on your porch or the designated location you desire, and we will pick them up when they are complete.

Phone Calls: With a short script and a list of phone numbers and contacts, we can provide all necessary materials for you to make a few phone calls from your home! I would be grateful to send the information to your email to make it as easy and comfortable as possible for you to do so.

Again, thank you for your continued support of Kathy Landing, the strongest Republican candidate to win back our Congressional district. If you are able to dedicate any time to these volunteer opportunities, it will definitely advance Kathy's message across the district in the safest way possible during this time.

On to victory,

Emily Rybak

\--

Emily Rybak
Campaign Manager

[emily@kathylanding.com](mailto:emily@kathylanding.com)
843-333-3195

name: Colin Lauderdale, Campaign Manager
subject: I noticed something weird. Can you take a look?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
This morning I was looking at the numbers and noticed something weird. After we shared with our supporters that we're just a handful of donations away from reaching our goal — our fundraising dropped.
#
This morning I was looking at the numbers and noticed something weird.
After we shared with our supporters how many more donations we need to hit our FEC end-of-quarter goal — **our fundraising dropped. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16682832/177477565/-205261657?refcode=em20200330&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc1NzY2MS1hNDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOoQy-M6g1KSuGdMq0U4kFZ208KM6ahgwPx9y0cU7fo=)
**[We can’t afford to fall behind this close to the deadline — the FEC deadline is tomorrow at midnight. We must hurry now to make up for what we didn’t raise the past 2 days. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16682846/177477579/-205261657?refcode=em20200330&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc1NzY2MS1hNDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOoQy-M6g1KSuGdMq0U4kFZ208KM6ahgwPx9y0cU7fo=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16682847/177477580/-205261657?refcode=em20200330&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc1NzY2MS1hNDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOoQy-M6g1KSuGdMq0U4kFZ208KM6ahgwPx9y0cU7fo=)****
Thankfully we still have _just enough time_ to catch up.
To be honest with you — if you asked me two weeks ago what I think our chances are we’ll hit our quarterly fundraising goal I probably would’ve said low.
_But then our grassroots supporters surprised us._ So many of you have stepped up to help our campaign close the gap and show your support for Charles’ bold, progressive agenda.
**Now we’re closer than we ever thought we’d be to hitting our goal — but that doesn’t mean it’s time to slow down._It’s time to finish the job._**
****[We have less than 48 hours to get back on track to hitting our $20,000 goal and catch up on our fundraising dip yesterday. Will you give even just $5 today to help us cross the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16682848/177477581/-205261657?refcode=em20200330&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc1NzY2MS1hNDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOoQy-M6g1KSuGdMq0U4kFZ208KM6ahgwPx9y0cU7fo=)****
Let’s do this,
Colin
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

** **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
Today, at one of my pharmacies at 12:30pm, I will be going live on Facebook to discuss COVID-19. I hope you can join us! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=4f010155df&u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=90776d39d7)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=bffc158cc2&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

These are chaotic and stressful days. We will get through this by relying on our uniquely Texan spirit. We never give up, we always persevere, and we rely on our community to get us through times like these.

As a pharmacist and small business owner operating on the front lines of the outbreak, I am heading to work every day to do my job serving patients and providing high-quality care.

Today, at one of my pharmacies at 12:30pm, I will be going live on Facebook to discuss COVID-19 and its impact on our communities. I hope you can join us!
* **Who** : Will Douglas, pharmacist & Republican nominee for TX-HD-113
* **Date** : Monday, March 30
* **When** : 12:30pm CT
* **Where** : [Will Douglas's campaign Facebook Page](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3634f3d2df&e=4f010155df)

While my campaign is still very much moving at full steam, we will continue to shift our focus away from public events to social media and technology-based campaigning. See below for a brief recap of our past week...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=fb966d2a9b&e=4f010155df)
---
On Wednesday, I recorded a short video from my pharmacy with my thoughts on our current situation: these are tough and challenging times, but Texas will emerge stronger as we always do. Please click through to watch.
|
---
|
---
Please excuse the clutter. Like other small business owners, this week I was crunching numbers and trying to chart a course for an unknown future and exploring what options are available. It’s critical we have legislators in the State House who have first-hand knowledge of the challenges that business owners face during crises like this.
|
---
| _**News Updates on COVID-19**_
* **Global:**[Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e02e9a8b5b&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 4am: 724,201 \-- Total deaths: 152,052.
* **U.S.:** [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e14a202fb8&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 4am: 143,055 \-- Total deaths: 2,514.
* **Texas** : [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=67a77b8183&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 4am: 2,552 -- Total deaths: 34.
* **Texas update:** In a Sunday afternoon press conference, Gov. Abbott [mandated](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d76e79cb42&e=4f010155df) a 14-day quarantine for travelers from Louisiana and other regions of the country and prohibited the release of violent felons.
* **Dallas County update:** Kay Bailey Hutchison Convention Center in downtown Dallas will be the site of Texas’ first pop-up hospital to treat coronavirus patients, Gov. Abbott [announced](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=81c80141df&e=4f010155df) Sunday.
* **Federal government latest:** On Sunday, President Trump [extended](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d1509adb3c&e=4f010155df) social distancing guidelines to April 30 and predicted 'great things' by June 1.
* **Other resources:** Texas DSHS on [how to avoid the virus](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=14fc352c93&e=4f010155df), [what to do if you get it](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=64b2a265f7&e=4f010155df).

---
|
---
| **_How to Help_**
If you have the means, and you want to help those less fortunate during this time, please consider donating to any of the charities below:
* [American Red Cross of North Texas](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=92db132ad3&e=4f010155df)
* [Communities In Schools of the Dallas Region](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0fd6058306&e=4f010155df)
* [North Texas Food Bank](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7ba481fcf5&e=4f010155df)
* [Salvation Army DFW](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ec69de449a&e=4f010155df)
* [United Way of Metropolitan Dallas](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f8629df167&e=4f010155df)

This is by no means an exhaustive list – if you want to help a specific charity in your area, I encourage you to do so.
Stay healthy and stay safe. We will get through this.

For Texas,

Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113
---
|
---

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: We’re facing an uphill battle
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/v-CrKPugxnSvi4TVhpHSe2VPJ2X_LRrlQ9y69Z9ZS50=)

Peter,

Under normal circumstances, our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline this Tuesday would be a make-or-break moment for our campaign. It's the first time our fundraising numbers will be made public this year, and it's our best chance to prove that we can close the gap on Rep. Clarke after outraising her in individual contributions last quarter.

These are not normal circumstances. But as we go fully digital for the health and safety of our staff, our volunteers, and our community, it's even more important that we hit our goals. **[So if you're able to give at this time, will you chip in whatever you can before Tuesday at midnight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=express_lane_200")******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******

We knew that making the switch wasn't going to be easy -- or cheap. And now that every other campaign is competing for the same digital advertising space, we're seriously at risk of falling behind because we can't match their resources or their spending. Unlike Rep. Clarke, I'm not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money, so we're already facing an uphill battle as it is. **[I know these are difficult times, but if you could rush in a donation today, it would mean so much to me and to our campaign. Can I count on your support?](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=)**

Best,
Adem
******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/JvbnNDZHzaafJt5n4BE58kyOHQO8ybI6oOCUDuTf4MA=/FUMWZsTYdmqznv2VLQOwSMT6pbE3t4U7BOJP_G7qe7s=)******

Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: Kim Neese
subject: My mom needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Kim Neese here. I am Terry's daughter and I want to tell you a little bit about why I believe we need to send my mom to Congress. **From a young age, my mom preached the values of hard work and faith in God. During these trying times, those are values we sorely need in Washington. ** Right now our businesses in Oklahoma are struggling. Now more than ever, we need a strong leader who understands small business. I know my mom is that candidate. **With over 30 years experience as a business owner, my mom understands that you cannot tax and regulate your way to prosperity. ** As a businesswoman myself, that is incredibly important. Our current Congresswoman, Kendra Horn, does not get it. Time after time, she has sided with Nancy Pelosi against our families and small businesses here in Oklahoma. **It is time for a change.** My mom will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and work with President Trump to enact conservative policies that help our families and small businesses. [With her most important fundraising deadline approaching tomorrow, I personally wanted to reach out to ask if we could count on you to make a small contribution today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/2960iC4763JI0Kz6KthoZuQQ/j7aB4qSfxrn2qdJhdteOwQ) When we send my mom to Congress, I know she will be a tremendous advocate for Oklahomans. And I know she'll bring those same values she instilled in me - hard work and faith in God - with her to Washington. Thank you, Kim
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/j9obzTs6VNrp3u4gmywFxQ/j7aB4qSfxrn2qdJhdteOwQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Z1VEG2763n892P5TsRZsi8mGQg/j7aB4qSfxrn2qdJhdteOwQ)
* * *

name: MJ Hegar Runoff HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn's war chest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de76/1429843780/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, past fundraising reports have shown Sen. Cornyn's war chest at over $12 million thanks to all the help he's taken from **Big Pharma, the NRA, and corporate PACs.** This upcoming report is likely to show that his corporate donors have given him even more money to dig out from under all his latest gaffes!

**We need your help to compete with Sen. Cornyn 's big money -- [so please donate before tomorrow's deadline to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de75/1429843780/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de75/1429843780/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Sen. Cornyn knows we're in the midst of a runoff, and he's using this to his advantage as he stockpiles funds from corporate PACs until he has to face off against MJ. **We need to come out of this runoff in the best position possible and ready to compete directly with Sen. Cornyn -- and that means putting up our best fundraising numbers yet this quarter.**

With help from this grassroots team, we're going to hit our goal, power through the runoff, and come out ready to fight back against all the tricks up Sen. Cornyn's sleeve -- but we can't do it without you! **Will you pitch in now to help us hit our first end-of-quarter goal of 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de74/1429843780/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de6a/1429843780/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de69/1429843780/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de68/1429843780/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__")**
\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de75/1429843780/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.1nd__1137__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de6f/1429843780/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1137&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ca/7f51f7bc/4cd71053/4ef1de6e/1429843780/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Matt Gaze
subject: Help Us Lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/85ofo4ZqQI-p85ES2P_M7ht0MHYprTqLKOSzYq2ElSY=?refcode=20200304&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Team, In just a few days, we face our first major FEC filing deadline of 2020. As you know, we are one of the most competitive congressional races in the country and our opponents and their dark money donors think they can buy this election. **[Will you chip in right now to help prove that this grassroots, people-powered campaign has what we need to finally bring true representation to TX-22? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/EmzyZANNy0ePrKQ6l8emzHGAtrDyKse-u4iK1Q3tpV0=?refcode=20200330_eom1&amount=25)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/IPi5_vEDTNJ-KvmpfSzYqZQiWzXT51hz55GRiwxHVIg=?refcode=20200330_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Q2BQjwyWzOja7YqdTfsD22bXkXvqJ69mKOBDQxYx2qY=?refcode=20200330_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Q2BQjwyWzOja7YqdTfsD22bXkXvqJ69mKOBDQxYx2qY=?refcode=20200330_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=100)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Q2BQjwyWzOja7YqdTfsD22bXkXvqJ69mKOBDQxYx2qY=?refcode=20200330_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=250)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Q2BQjwyWzOja7YqdTfsD22bXkXvqJ69mKOBDQxYx2qY=?refcode=20200330_eom1&express_lane=true)** When adversity hits, this campaign has risen to the challenge, time and again. While the administration in Washington deflects and hides their shortcomings, our campaign has been springing into action, creating a public health advisory board of local doctors to pass on health tips and to get that out through our community any way we can. Right now, we are crafting COVID-19 response flyers in 21 languages so that ALL of our community can stay home and stay safe. Yes, you read that right 21 languages. We won the primary in decisive fashion, and we know we can flip this seat, but we're going to need resources to do it. Any amount you can donate will help us hit our end-of-quarter deadline. Make a secure contribution here: [Sri2020.com/lead](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Q2BQjwyWzOja7YqdTfsD22bXkXvqJ69mKOBDQxYx2qY=?refcode=20200330_eom1). Thank you. Matt Gaze Finance Director
**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/I3Y99Bf44GT8eMWDMVhH6IUQQWsRE7JOk9IQTQVuPOU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/Z2JKdI_e1rEv8k8cc53kh6FCgGbvsNgBOAJBgCoEdKU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xCwE6DLitjPMvuG9z45zsI7r4q5qHqRCNrj1IGwiwhM=/-h5N-YQwFMu6YY9qnI-KD5NcZ1NaYE5ozzw879pco1U=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us4.campaign-archive.com/?e=5ac6ff05c3&u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=6314810598)
---
| |
---
| | **There is a big deadline coming up on TUESDAY, March 31, so we need your immediate help. **

As you may have seen, [Thomas Massie tried to block a coronavirus relief package supported by President Trump](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=b4dfe8a27d&e=5ac6ff05c3) and every other member of Congress. The package delivers $2,400 to every couple making under $150,000, plus $500 for every child.

As we head toward the end of the quarter tomorrow, please consider donating $24.00 to our campaign, just 1% of the relief check Massie tried to keep from the American people.

We are on a****_**VERY TIGHT DEADLINE**_. [Please contribute now](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=e86d4b347d&e=5ac6ff05c3), so we can get it accounted for in this quarter’s report.
---
| [DONATE $24.00 NOW](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=1fb854116c&e=5ac6ff05c3 "DONATE $24.00 NOW")
---
| We need just 26 donations of $24.00 to meet our quarterly goal.

I’ll close by saying this. I know these are difficult times economically, so I hope you know how much your contribution is appreciated. Thank you.

Stay well,
Todd McMurtry

_P.S. Please[make your contribution](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=6e4f760939&e=5ac6ff05c3) by MIDNIGHT on TUESDAY, MARCH 31. Then, **forward this email to any friend or neighbor** who you believe might want to help too. Any amount will help make sure Kentucky’s 4th congressional district finally has a conservative they can rely on in Congress._
---

[_**Every top Democrat under the sun asked because hitting Ben Ray 's end-of-quarter goal is MAKE OR BREAK to defeat McConnell's Senate! How's about you toss in $10 before the 24-hour deadline to get the job done for Democrats? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200329_em_fr_b2_carville_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Here's the deal: \-- McConnell could lose his seat -- and his whole freaking majority \-- Even _Fox News_ admits Mitch McConnell's approval is TANKING \-- But Democrats' chances are ZERO to defeat McConnell's Senate if we don't win New Mexico If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give Ben Ray our money NOW! He's got a gap to fill and only 24 hours until the end-of-quarter deadline to do it. Can I count on ya? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200329_em_fr_b2_carville_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b61a/18e32a7f/4ec153d1/7b220002/1965243330/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b61a/18e32a7f/4ec153d1/7b220003/1965243330/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b61a/18e32a7f/4ec153d1/7b220000/1965243330/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

Can I count on ya? | | **** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** -Carville "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Josh Hicks
subject: A politician vs. a representative
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
There’s one thing this crisis has made clear: the difference between a politician and a representative. It’s the difference between someone who will do anything and say anything to get elected and a leader who will work for their district.
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16687102/177514775/-1344452394?refcode=HIC_20200330_eoq4_em_fr_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYzMmQ2Ni1iMjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmYl4M9anot7ZcDeyrUlH6_zEmPcGp6UvlqullN5A8c=)
---
| Friends, These are tough times for all of us. There’s one thing this crisis has made clear: the difference between a politician and a representative. It’s the difference between someone who will do anything and say anything to get elected and a leader who will work for their district. **When a politician goes to Washington, they think, “What are the things I can do to help my reelection chances? How can I cloak myself in power?”** **When a representative goes to Washington, they think, “What are the things that will do the most good, and help my people the most?”** My promise to you? I’m not a politician. I’m running to be the next representative for Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. **And, right now, I could use your help.[Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is tomorrow night at midnight and I’m counting on grassroots donors to help us reach our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16687103/177514776/993914319?refcode=HIC_20200330_eoq4_em_fr_all_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYzMmQ2Ni1iMjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmYl4M9anot7ZcDeyrUlH6_zEmPcGp6UvlqullN5A8c=)** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16687104/177514777/-1344452394?refcode=HIC_20200330_eoq4_em_fr_all_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYzMmQ2Ni1iMjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmYl4M9anot7ZcDeyrUlH6_zEmPcGp6UvlqullN5A8c=) From day one, my campaign has been about what it would really mean to bring representation to this district. **To me, the best way to do that is to refuse corporate PAC or special interest money. I won’t take a single penny of their money.** I want to see structural change in Washington. Regular people — not whoever’s going to cut your next six-figure campaign check — should be front and center of every bill, every debate, and every vote a member of Congress takes. **I understand you might not be able to give right now.[But if you’re able, make a donation now and we can send a message to the politicians in Washington that Kentucky’s 6th District is ready for a real representative.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16687105/177514778/993914319?refcode=HIC_20200330_eoq4_em_fr_all_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYzMmQ2Ni1iMjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmYl4M9anot7ZcDeyrUlH6_zEmPcGp6UvlqullN5A8c=)** Thank you, Josh
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16687106/177514779/-1344452394?refcode=HIC_20200330_eoq4_em_fr_all_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYzMmQ2Ni1iMjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmYl4M9anot7ZcDeyrUlH6_zEmPcGp6UvlqullN5A8c=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
We have until midnight tomorrow.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa141/18d6a294/4cb4cbcd/26d611a6/3177271818/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Quick update:
1. The first FEC deadline of 2020 is just over 24 hours away.
2. The campaign landscape has dramatically changed, and we're tracking behind where we need to be.
3. Marsha Blackburn, President Trump, and special-interest groups are all in to send another rubber-stamp to the U.S. Senate.

We can flip this open seat, take back the Senate, and stop the Washington establishment from winning in Tennessee, but we need grassroots support to do it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: You Deserve to Know This
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/you-deserve-to-know-this?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# _**Mariannette Miller-Meeks ****hasn't been transparent with the 2nd District.**_

Mariannette Miller-Meeks says in the “Pro-Life” video on her website that she “believes life is tremendously special, and that we all have a purpose for being on Earth”. That would lead one to believe she’s pro-life right? WRONG.

[HERE](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=942a6d63d0&e=90fad69796), you will find a video in which a constituent asks her a question about her views on a set week for abortion rights, to which she responds, “From the medical standpoint, 6-12 weeks”. **She believes in abortion even when a fetal heartbeat is detectable**. That is absolutely unacceptable. Not only is the view that it is medically ok to abort a baby up to 12 weeks wrong, but it is wrong to mislead potential voters by suggesting that you are pro-life.

I believe that we as Americans need to defend life to its fullest, and that life begins at conception. ** I need you right now more than ever. ** We need a candidate in Congress that will stand up and fight for the unborn, that’s why we’re inviting you to chip in $50, $200, or even $75 dollars today.

For Iowa and for **LIFE** ,

\- Bobby Schilling

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iwmA_kVxKLQ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b386635ec5&e=90fad69796)

| | Friends,

My family and I, we're taking this a day at a time.

**I hope you and your family are safe, happy** and **healthy right now.** There is no pretending this is a normal or good time for everyone. But **we will get through this,**_**together.**_

I wanted to make sure you saw my video here: [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=df56c3ddb5&e=f1831b4ca2)
I know, it feels a bit like we’re building the plane as we fly it. I know my world has been turned a bit upside down.

But my race for Congress goes on; as I still have a primary to win on June 9th.

If you’re able to help, please help today if you can:

subject: Ivanka Trump: Emergency Relief Bill Will Help America’s Small Businesses
body:
"For over three years, our administration has been fighting hard for your success, rolling back the red tape to ease regulations..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3af4cc51c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump: Emergency Relief Bill Will Help America’s Small Businesses**

“For over three years, our administration has been fighting hard for your success, rolling back the red tape to ease regulations, launching the ‘Pledge to America’s Workers’ to champion more workforce opportunities in this economic boom and fighting for the forgotten man and woman,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes in _The Kansas City Star._

“Now, more than ever, we stand with you and we are committed to helping you through this uncertain time. Friday, President Donald Trump took the boldest action in history to provide emergency relief for American workers and families — and to preserve our nation’s small businesses.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4c3cf0ef96&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump visited Naval Station Norfolk Saturday to see off the USNS Comfort as it headed to New York with medical staff and hospital beds to combat the coronavirus pandemic . . . The plan is for the ship to take patients needing hospital care that are not infected with the virus, freeing up much-needed space in the city’s hospitals,” Gary Harki reports for [_The Virginian-Pilot_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42b62972eb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Sunday said the U.S. will make three times more ventilators over the next 100 days than it typically produces in a year. Speaking from the White House, Mr. Trump said the pace of production will depend on companies that he is asking—or compelling, through the Defense Production Act—to prioritize federal orders for the life-saving machines,” Tom Howell Jr. writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb2a66200c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Venezuela’s authoritarian Nicolás Maduro is even more evil than the world knew: He’s not just driving his own country to ruin, he’s apparently a global drug kingpin, too. The US Justice Department last week indicted Maduro and four of his lieutenants on drug-trafficking, money-laundering and corruption charges,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67bc21479f&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6e8896c8c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14d58c6655&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=bc56509c50)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: One more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7bWf101n-BMOW8sfq4XYnauLh1YAt9cco5TODTLOTtb9X1WoGekM-8iaO_qkk4BD1N9987XLp3V3_V9Q1EE_Qa0PlsbLAZ_Tkiv9ZcwTBvdfjgl1oNEg74xe6jnQNe-fMfFo5KOgrOchaybkr5xeufWvCOpt0INlZ9W6EbHFuuX9vnPwmo4g==&c=K0t0WfhGmaGVbT_hS8PQL8mDUzF4_XokGiVXYNXLuVpHV72IgWZe8w==&ch=tvPEwnfC5vROPgDzAriVbBKuFrjl0QCJ7pwSU-0NfExQvjw1p-LrFw==)
---
| Peter,
As you've likely heard me say over the last few weeks, now is not the time for partisan politics. We must be united as Texans and Americans to help each other during this COVID-19 epidemic.
Even though I've put partisan politics on hold, the truth of the matter is that we are still in the middle of an incredibly competitive campaign for Congress, and tomorrow night at 11:59PM is our critical end of quarter fundraising deadline.
---
| | | [STAND WITH US](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7bWf101n-BMOW8sfq4XYnauLh1YAt9cco5TODTLOTtb9X1WoGekM-8iaO_qkk4BD1N9987XLp3V3_V9Q1EE_Qa0PlsbLAZ_Tkiv9ZcwTBvdfjgl1oNEg74xe6jnQNe-fMfFo5KOgrOchaybkr5xeufWvCOpt0INlZ9W6EbHFuuX9vnPwmo4g==&c=K0t0WfhGmaGVbT_hS8PQL8mDUzF4_XokGiVXYNXLuVpHV72IgWZe8w==&ch=tvPEwnfC5vROPgDzAriVbBKuFrjl0QCJ7pwSU-0NfExQvjw1p-LrFw==)
---
| I know that many Texans are hurting right now and worried about how they're going to cover life's expenses. They have been laid off, had their hours cut, or are employers who are struggling to make payroll.
Please only [contribute to my campaign's end of quarter efforts](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7bWf101n-BMOW8sfq4XYnauLh1YAt9cco5TODTLOTtb9X1WoGekM-8iaO_qkk4BD1N9987XLp3V3_V9Q1EE_Qa0PlsbLAZ_Tkiv9ZcwTBvdfjgl1oNEg74xe6jnQNe-fMfFo5KOgrOchaybkr5xeufWvCOpt0INlZ9W6EbHFuuX9vnPwmo4g==&c=K0t0WfhGmaGVbT_hS8PQL8mDUzF4_XokGiVXYNXLuVpHV72IgWZe8w==&ch=tvPEwnfC5vROPgDzAriVbBKuFrjl0QCJ7pwSU-0NfExQvjw1p-LrFw==) if you feel that you are in a comfortable enough financial position to do so. You and your family come first.
[We have an ambitious fundraising goal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7bWf101n-BMOW8sfq4XYnauLh1YAt9cco5TODTLOTtb9X1WoGekM-8iaO_qkk4BD1N9987XLp3V3_V9Q1EE_Qa0PlsbLAZ_Tkiv9ZcwTBvdfjgl1oNEg74xe6jnQNe-fMfFo5KOgrOchaybkr5xeufWvCOpt0INlZ9W6EbHFuuX9vnPwmo4g==&c=K0t0WfhGmaGVbT_hS8PQL8mDUzF4_XokGiVXYNXLuVpHV72IgWZe8w==&ch=tvPEwnfC5vROPgDzAriVbBKuFrjl0QCJ7pwSU-0NfExQvjw1p-LrFw==) in order to take this seat back and turn it red, but like so many Texans right now, we will find a way to make do with less if necessary.
[If you can contribute, please remember that we have a huge deadline at 11:59PM on March 31st](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7bWf101n-BMOW8sfq4XYnauLh1YAt9cco5TODTLOTtb9X1WoGekM-8iaO_qkk4BD1N9987XLp3V3_V9Q1EE_Qa0PlsbLAZ_Tkiv9ZcwTBvdfjgl1oNEg74xe6jnQNe-fMfFo5KOgrOchaybkr5xeufWvCOpt0INlZ9W6EbHFuuX9vnPwmo4g==&c=K0t0WfhGmaGVbT_hS8PQL8mDUzF4_XokGiVXYNXLuVpHV72IgWZe8w==&ch=tvPEwnfC5vROPgDzAriVbBKuFrjl0QCJ7pwSU-0NfExQvjw1p-LrFw==). I thank you for your support in this race, and I hope and pray for your health and wellbeing during these times.
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32
---

name: GeorgetteGomez.org
subject: It would mean the world to us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16692314/177562185/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVjZjc5NC1jMzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddANwnpI4jLRR2f091mzSTxsaXj69kMELtjLbKGalF0=&emci=98647c2d-b172-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f05cf794-c372-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Friends –

It would mean the world to all of us if you could take a look at the email we sent earlier. We included it below just in case you missed it.

**We know this is an unexpected and difficult time. But it is essential to our efforts that those of us who can**[make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16692315/177562186/1136511447?refcode=em-200330-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVjZjc5NC1jMzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddANwnpI4jLRR2f091mzSTxsaXj69kMELtjLbKGalF0=) ** before tomorrow’s end-of-quarter deadline.**

Thank you for reading, and thank you for your ongoing support.

_Team Gómez_ **[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-200330-all-a)**
_**Begin Forwarded Message:**_ We hope you are not among those who have suddenly found themselves facing unexpected difficult times. If you are... _this email is not for you._

This email is only for those fortunate enough to have a steady income during these tough times. These are not easy words to write at this moment, but the truth is we need your support -- now more than ever.

As you can imagine, we have radically shifted how we are operating our campaign for Congress. _Most notably, we have cancelled in-person fundraisers._ That has required us to rethink how to raise the funds we need to continue to fight for the progressive, humanitarian values we believe in.

**So much has changed, but the amount required to make a successful bid for Congress has not. And right now, running a competitive, well-funded campaign means raising another $15,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline hits on Tuesday.**

So we have to ask: **[If you are able, can you please contribute $3 or more to Georgette’s campaign today? Not only will you help us meet our FEC fundraising goal, you’ll help us send a powerful message that we’re still as committed as ever to our shared progressive values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16692316/177562187/1136511447?refcode=em-200330-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVjZjc5NC1jMzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ddANwnpI4jLRR2f091mzSTxsaXj69kMELtjLbKGalF0=)**

We can’t do this without you, friend. Thank you.

_Team Gómez_ **[DONATE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-200330-all-a)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. We know this is an unexpected and difficult time. But it is essential to our efforts that those of us who can= before tomorrow’s end-of-quarter deadline. Thank you for reading, and thank you for your ongoing support. Team Gómez Begin Forwarded Message: We hope you are not among those who have suddenly found themselves facing unexpected difficult times. If you are... this email is not for you. This email is only for those fortunate enough to have a steady income during these tough times. These are not easy words to write at this moment, but the truth is we need your support -- now more than ever. As you can imagine, we have radically shifted how we are operating our campaign for Congress. Most notably, we have cancelled in-person fundraisers. That has required us to rethink how to raise the funds we need to continue to fight for the progressive, humanitarian values we believe in. So much has changed, but the amount required to make a successful bid for Congress has not. And right now, running a competitive, well-funded campaign means raising another $15,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline hits on Tuesday. So we have to ask: = We can’t do this without you, friend. body:
Just $4.80 from you can get us where we need to go. We don’t need as much money as Mitch or other establishment career politicians in this race.
#
We want to share some good news and bad news.
**The bad news: we haven’t hit our $20,000 goal yet -- and the deadline to hit this goal comes in fewer than 48 hours.** We’re cutting it incredibly close, and how much we raise by this fundraising deadline is crucial to the success of our campaign.
**Now for the good news: we’re 90% of the way to hitting our $20,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal.** And if everyone who reads this email gives just $4.80 -- we can hit our goal. _Instantly. _
**[Can you rush a $4.80 contribution to our campaign and help us reach our most important fundraising goal to date?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16693379/177573962/1338497832?refcode=em20200330-2-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWY0NzVhOS1jNzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5gRt4noKwzixNeG38F7OsWij7EVw_RQ2CnfGxP7fk4=)**

Since Charles announced his intent to run for Senate, we at Team Booker have been working overtime to spread Charles’ bold, progressive vision for Kentucky to voters.
We’re talking to voters about issues they care about most, taking care of each other, and widely sharing our strategy to beat Mitch -- and doing it without taking a dime from the corporate PACs that bankroll his corrupt operation.
**We don’t need as much money as Mitch or other establishment career politicians in this race. But we’re asking that you help us raise just enough to reach out to voters, grow our movement, and build a brighter future for Kentucky.**
**[If you can afford it, please: chip in $4.80 today to help us meet our important end-of-quarter goal by March 31.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16693382/177573965/1338497832?refcode=em20200330-2-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWY0NzVhOS1jNzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5gRt4noKwzixNeG38F7OsWij7EVw_RQ2CnfGxP7fk4=)**
****[Contribute $4.80](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16693383/177573966/1338497832?refcode=em20200330-2&amount=4.80&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWY0NzVhOS1jNzcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5gRt4noKwzixNeG38F7OsWij7EVw_RQ2CnfGxP7fk4=)****
We can’t do this without you -- thank you, thank you, thank you.
Team Booker
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

clean_body: Just $4.80 from you can get us where we need to go. We don’t need as much money as Mitch or other establishment career politicians in this race. We want to share some good news and bad news. The bad news: we haven’t hit our $20,000 goal yet -- and the deadline to hit this goal comes in fewer than 48 hours. We’re cutting it incredibly close, and how much we raise by this fundraising deadline is crucial to the success of our campaign. Now for the good news: we’re 90% of the way to hitting our $20,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal. And if everyone who reads this email gives just $4.80 -- we can hit our goal. Instantly. = **= = Since Charles announced his intent to run for Senate, we at Team Booker have been working overtime to spread Charles’ bold, progressive vision for Kentucky to voters. We’re talking to voters about issues they care about most, taking care of each other, and widely sharing our strategy to beat Mitch -- and doing it without taking a dime from the corporate PACs that bankroll his corrupt operation. We don’t need as much money as Mitch or other establishment career politicians in this race. But we’re asking that you help us raise just enough to reach out to voters, grow our movement, and build a brighter future for Kentucky. = = We can’t do this without you -- thank you, thank you, thank you. Team Booker P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us. =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.I'm a new Text block ready for your content. | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | 824 S. name: Senate Race Update (2)
subject: re: Republican corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The Washington Post says winning in Georgia is the KEY to Democrats taking back the Senate - so this is alarming news:
| | |
---
| | **MATCH ALERT!**
---
**All gifts DOUBLED to defeat Kelly Loeffler (R), flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate! Match expires tomorrow at 11:59 pm. Please, give now to have your contribution go twice as far!**
---
| | [DONATE $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk143-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=5")
---
Friend, _The_ _Washington Post_ says winning in Georgia is the KEY to Democrats taking back the Senate - so this is alarming news:
| | | | Our Republican opponent - Kelly Loeffler - is _flooding_ the race with $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | _POLITICO_ says Mitch McConnell is lining up "the full backing of the Republican establishment" to support her. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Worst of all: News just broke that she knew critical information about the coronavirus threat and instead of telling the public, dropped MILLIONS in stock before the crisis took hold. |
---|---|---|---
**With an opponent like this, failure is simply not an option.**
**_That's why we need your urgent support, friend_.** Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN win in Georgia and take back the Senate - but if we lose here, we'll hand Senate control back to McConnell.
**[Friend: If you're ready to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more now so we can defeat McConnell's chosen candidate and flip this seat blue? All gifts made before Tuesday's critical FEC deadline will be DOUBLED thanks to a generous group of donors.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk143-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
At times like these, we need moral leadership in the Senate - leaders who will fight for the people, not just their personal bottom line. Our Republican opponent has spent so much time in corporate board rooms and Washington back rooms that she can no longer be trusted to do what's right.
**Winning this race is critical, but it won't be easy. For us to defeat our GOP opponent, flip Georgia blue and end McConnell's reign in the Senate, we need immediate grassroots support. But r****ight now, we're falling short of our crucial goal - and time is running out before this critical FEC deadline. The _only_ way we'll close this gap is if every single grassroots supporter pitches in right now. [Friend: If you want to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more so we can defeat Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate and flip Georgia blue? All gifts made before the FEC deadline will go twice as far. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk143-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks — I returned to Minnesota on Thursday, after working to pass urgently needed help for working families, small businesses, and our health care workers in response to the coronavirus pandemic. I’m proud of the work we did. And now I’m home, safe and sound, as I hope you are. Archie made homemade bread over the weekend, and I’m adjusting to working for Minnesota from my kitchen table rather than my Senate office in Washington, D.C. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16694817/177588047/1243818353?refcode=em200330-wfh&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1ZjY1Mi1jZDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUDAhZZpeDbMcD2gY1g3BPd4i3LZXeEoGhBY3q0P_FM=) Our campaign has always emphasized making grassroots, person-to-person connections. This is how I learned to campaign from watching Paul Wellstone. And though none of us could have imagined this new reality, the work of lifting up the voices of Minnesotans, and winning this most important of elections, continues. So, as you are sitting around your own kitchen table, I’m inviting you to join me in doing the grassroots work we need to do, in a new way. **If it makes sense for you financially, I am asking you to make a contribution to our grassroots campaign today. It’s never been more important to elect a government that works for regular folks. My hope is that you will give me the opportunity to continue doing right by you in the Senate.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16694818/177588048/1243818353?refcode=em200330-wfh&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=true&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1ZjY1Mi1jZDcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUDAhZZpeDbMcD2gY1g3BPd4i3LZXeEoGhBY3q0P_FM=)

clean_body: | Folks — I returned to Minnesota on Thursday, after working to pass urgently needed help for working families, small businesses, and our health care workers in response to the coronavirus pandemic. I’m proud of the work we did. And now I’m home, safe and sound, as I hope you are. Archie made homemade bread over the weekend, and I’m adjusting to working for Minnesota from my kitchen table rather than my Senate office in Washington, D.C. = Our campaign has always emphasized making grassroots, person-to-person connections. This is how I learned to campaign from watching Paul Wellstone. And though none of us could have imagined this new reality, the work of lifting up the voices of Minnesotans, and winning this most important of elections, continues. So, as you are sitting around your own kitchen table, I’m inviting you to join me in doing the grassroots work we need to do, in a new way. If it makes sense for you financially, I am asking you to make a contribution to our grassroots campaign today. It’s never been more important to elect a government that works for regular folks. My hope is that you will give me the opportunity to continue doing right by you in the Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I appreciate any contribution you are able to make. This is no ordinary time, and I need you to take care of yourself and your loved ones first. Today, I am feeling especially grateful for this team and for each of you. Thank you so much for your constant support. I really mean it. — Tina P.S. I know this is a difficult time for everyone, so please stay safe out there. name: Aaron Slutkin
subject: We have to get his message out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm Aaron, Admiral Mike's communications director, and I want to tell you about our efforts to spread our message to every county in Iowa.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi crew, I'm Aaron, Admiral Mike's communications director, and I want to tell you about our efforts to spread our message to every county in Iowa. The Admiral has already recorded 99 videos -- one for each county -- and we're getting ready to release them. But we need your help. We need to get another 201 donors to chip in by midnight on Tuesday to hit our goal so we have the funds to run all 99 ads. **The Admiral is matching every donation from now until midnight tomorrow -- will you help make this happen?[_If you 're able, chip in today. _](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2493/33365068/4a69cc56/3f8bef90/245116206/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200330_eom3_em_fr_all_L1")** | [Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2493/33365068/4a69cc56/3f8bef91/245116206/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200330_eom3_em_fr_all_btn")
---
These ads will run across the state, and they're crucial to introduce Iowans to their next senator.
The Admiral is exactly the person we need at the helm in Washington. He is a leader, and I know this crew will do everything in our power to get him there.
[_**So make a matched contribution today, if you can, and help us reach every voter in Iowa with our bold online communications plan.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2493/33365068/4a69cc56/3f8bef92/245116206/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200330_eom3_em_fr_all_l2")
Thank you,
Aaron
Communications Director

subject: Our Second Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Tiffany Shedd is concerned about the Democrats’ increased interest in confiscating our guns. It’s looking more and more like Joe Biden will become the Democratic nominee for President. **Biden supports limiting our gun ownership rights and making Beto O’Rourke a gun confiscation czar.**
Our Second Amendment rights must be protected. **Tiffany Shedd is a proud 4-H-certified pistol and NRA-certified shotgun coach. She strongly supports and exercises her right to protect herself and her family.** We need Tiffany in Congress to support and protect our Second Amendment rights. clean_body: Friends, Tiffany Shedd is concerned about the Democrats’ increased interest in confiscating our guns. It’s looking more and more like Joe Biden will become the Democratic nominee for President. Biden supports limiting our gun ownership rights and making Beto O’Rourke a gun confiscation czar. Our Second Amendment rights must be protected. Tiffany Shedd is a proud 4-H-certified pistol and NRA-certified shotgun coach. She strongly supports and exercises her right to protect herself and her family. We need Tiffany in Congress to support and protect our Second Amendment rights. We know this isn’t a good time to reach out, but our FEC deadline is still active and with so much at stake this November, we can’t afford to fall behind. This deadline is so important that all donations made before midnight tomorrow Thank you for your support, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

body:
I’m sure you saw Lisa’s last email, and I really hope you were able to hear the tone of urgency behind it as well. As Lisa mentioned, this quarter’s Peter, I’m sure you saw Lisa’s last email, and I really hope you were able to hear the tone of urgency behind it as well.
As Lisa mentioned, this quarter’s FEC filings could be our most important not only to date, but for the rest of this election season, up until November. It’s crucial, now more than ever, that you not only step up, but step up BIG.
The fact that I’ve cancelled all in-person events and fundraisers due to COVID-19 makes this online goal even more important.
That’s why I’ve decided to set a goal. I’ve seen how Pennsylvanians rally together, and I think we can do just that here, right now, for the next few hours.
**[I’m hopeful that we can raise $10,000 before 11:59 p.m. on Tuesday night, March 31. I know this is a big goal, but I’m also confident in Team Scheller to help us not only meet this goal, but surpass it. ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=20a44f45b3234b8e8dc303ee0ddaa1fb&_e=hdG38oRmN1a32kZCDyQEKo1RY-Vsec_1JxV6kUIV3T9onXb9bvCtsFIYsPY0tR8Pw6S0FKuiul2wWF1E1TocyK9jLVdSF2A0fIeTYcOCEXhwxUoiBuwwGMAPZspO9SIp5IM79GoNPv677UEMxv-7w57NEeXgtgkfikmBBEnJ35Zk4oRKRiO0oBKoycWnOYYNbF3Lna8STeFVm0-brkLc_mZSUyYusOpTxqm3flpIyBUyA5Dv9jgyfDcpkaGjplQM46h3nVgWm48Mf_tJzKb-DBy63YROYrtkXy-OUjtyOjm6aXvPzeB_V9ThI79nKdRUwj_cN8_aQdpUGG7d9uGOOxddJNkSGl3MHzzrYZaQPLMXCvQ4ojgEyGu3hXPTeXhD-OPD28EdJTBI8JLpX48RHzElVrSiN7gCms5-M3ofhSpRNIsNNbkqypGM12QQw9fQ)** **END OF QUARTER DEADLINE:** DAYS LEFT TILL DEADLINE: 1 GOAL: $10,000 GOAL STATUS: **SHORT** [ **CHIP IN** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=20a44f45b3234b8e8dc303ee0ddaa1fb&_e=hdG38oRmN1a32kZCDyQEKo1RY-Vsec_1JxV6kUIV3T9onXb9bvCtsFIYsPY0tR8Pw6S0FKuiul2wWF1E1TocyK9jLVdSF2A0fIeTYcOCEXhwxUoiBuwwGMAPZspO9SIp5IM79GoNPv677UEMxv-7w57NEeXgtgkfikmBBEnJ35Zk4oRKRiO0oBKoycWnOYYNbF3Lna8STeFVm0-brkLc_kg9yvVfCpV1dM4xBpUbZ2Q_NqhBFwzNPhm-nb98-zbrOPzQkH2qbqUWRqpl_Z6a31I5_EHyAMmPuxW4xIJ6mFaPF3HcG0IZx8PA7rvzebcb-m3ZtRXW6Df0M2ZIO1E5LR_b7adlscTUDlchry8QZBet2Xi2MmMBa_1q4DEzg8nBObSTO5PPiXKHM_ja81qNxcv0Bgq4kC19vHEcg8n9RrccrXkHnzauARoriHCHQ_h3) Meeting this deadline is huge not just for Lisa’s campaign, but also for the Republican party. name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy?=
subject: Stay Healthy, Keep Your Faith, Support Your Community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Heather and I hope this letter finds you healthy as we navigate the uncharted waters of the COVID-19 pandemic and the personal, professional, and economic turmoil that this has caused. We are hopeful that this passes quickly and leaves you and yours unharmed. We pray for those directly affected for a quick recovery and pray for the families of those lost. We have seen a tremendous need in our community and have focused on solving problems we are all facing, not just locally, but on a national level. Heather and I have been blessed and have been trying to meaningfully give back in this time of crisis. We focused on doing what we could locally, such as offering to run errands, or pick up necessities for those who couldn’t on their own. Then we started working on a larger scale project producing hand sanitizer to protect our community and help slow the spread of COVID-19 infections. Heather and I are co-owners of a distillery in Bozeman. We have an amazing group of partners, staff, and volunteers that helped convert our spirit manufacturing business into a hand sanitizer production facility. We offer free personal bottles to anyone who asked for one. This grew and we started supplying hand sanitizer to first responders in Gallatin County. That grew as we started supplying to first responders, frontline workers, and businesses across the state. We’ve had great partnerships, both public and private, and the Montana Highway Patrol has relayed buckets of sanitizer to both the eastern and western parts of the state to hospitals and organizations in desperate need.
---
|
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=6c05095d59&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
| As the word got out, we have received requests from all over the country, and as far away as New York. I want to personally thank Senator Daines and Congressman Gianforte for listening to our concerns and helping get much-needed regulatory relief into the CARES Act that has loosened regulatory control allowing us to protect the frontlines more quickly and cost effectively. This helps local distilleries across the nation to quickly ramp up and produce for their local needs. We have an amazing team, and the basic operations are starting to streamline as our partners, staff, and volunteers put their hearts and souls into protecting our community. On the campaign front, we have slowed down to focus our efforts on this crisis. Now we must restart our conversation with our fellow Montanans on our plans to reduce insurance costs and increase choices through a better regulatory environment that encourages businesses to do business in Montana. We will hack away meaningless regulation that gets in the way of business while focusing on regulations that protect Montanans against bad actors. We will continue the discussion on increasing choices and competition for all Montanans. We will continue the conversation about supporting our farming, ranching, timber, and mining industries on the Land Board. We will protect what is dear to us, and manage our State Trust Lands in a manner that we can protect them forever while raising much-needed money for public education.
---
|
---
| | We will continue the conversation about giving entrepreneurs the tools they need to thrive, raising money to start their businesses as securities while protecting investors and retirees from those who would mislead or defraud them. We will continue the conversation about protecting our seniors from those who would betray their trust and attempt to defraud them. I look forward to continuing these meaningful conversations, hearing your concerns and ideas, and I look forward to serving ALL Montanans as your next Commissioner of Insurance and Securities as well as your representative on the Board of Land Commissioners. In these trying times, Heather and I pray that you stay healthy, keep your faith, support your community, and do the best to weather the storm. This too shall pass and we look forward to celebrating the recovery on the other side. As difficult as it is asking for support in a time of crisis, we must fund our campaign. For those of you who can spare, even a small amount, it is helpful and appreciated. Running a statewide campaign is expensive and even $5, $25, $50 can help us get our message out. In any case, stay healthy. God Bless you and your family,

-Troy
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=c90d02effc&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| _PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
Copyright © 2020 Troy Downing for Montana All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 6668 Bozeman, MT 59771
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=7412d70688&e=a212bb87cc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=7412d70688&e=a212bb87cc&c=84ce807443).

---

| | Peter, We have a close race here in Maine and we need your help now more than ever. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d052b/72412298/4e71ca57/6104c5f4/1829124608/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDMzMF9HaWRlb25TcGxpdF9VMl9YMiIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200330_GideonSplit_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200329_GideonSplit_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200329_GideonSplit_U2_X2") Polls show us gaining on Susan Collins -- and we need your help to stay competitive and help flip the Senate. If we win this seat and take back the Senate, we can make progress on the issues we care about most, like lowering the cost of prescription drugs and ending gerrymandering. **And it 's how we can expand access to the ballot through automatic voter registration as we did in Maine under my leadership.**
I'm hoping to bring my experience fighting every day for Mainers to the Senate, but in a race as close as this, I'll need your help to win.
[**Can you contribute $5, $10, or $15 to my campaign 's end-of-quarter deadline and Voter Protection Project so we can beat Susan Collins and flip the Senate?**](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200330_GideonSplit_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Can+you+contribute+5+10+or+15+to+my+camp&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200329_GideonSplit_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200329_GideonSplit_U2_X2")

clean_body: I just wanted to send you a quick note to let you know that we are approaching our first quarter deadline for 2020 Peter, I just wanted to send you a quick note to let you know that we are approaching our first quarter deadline for 2020, and we are just short of hitting our goal. We have a real shot to win this primary and defeat Democrat Kendra Horn in November, but we need your help. We can’t afford another two years with a House controlled by liberals. They are turning this country into a socialist mess, and nothing is getting done! If we want to continue building upon the progress made under President Trump, we need to elect more conservative allies and business-minded folks to the House. Kendra Horn serves herself rather than the people of CD-5. It’s high time we fix Congress and get politicians working for us again, and this means removing Kendra Horn from office. But we can't do anything unless we meet our goal before March is over. Please help us meet our FEC deadline and donate by clicking the link below. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | - | ---|---|---|---
