subject: If you can...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
Yesterday, my team sent out an email on the Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation's COVID-19 Emergency Relief Fund. Did you get a chance to read it?
In short, we're asking those who can to make a donation to help restaurants and restaurant workers nationwide. I don't need to tell you that our current health crisis has been detrimental for small, independent business owners -- restaurants included. **[That's why we're asking you to make a contribution to this worthy cause](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xi6dPwhlqiWc-i4wbyb8MU6x4SJqX5O_D4R4Ui1VOX0=/H8EUZGL2f2_3xqbl8CnDM3Z3OUyctVEzz8u0h_q2IS8=?refcode=X_033020_RWCF_B)[>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xi6dPwhlqiWc-i4wbyb8MU6x4SJqX5O_D4R4Ui1VOX0=/MwCC07-6Z99To5F3y8owzd6zmXO5HDxv2IR90qE4omg=?refcode=X_033020_RWCF_B)**
Read more below ⬇️⬇️
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
_****_
All across the United States, restaurants are being hit hard by the economic side effects of coronavirus. With thousands of restaurants temporarily closed and restaurant employees subsequently laid off, many in the food service industry need help to stay afloat.
**That 's why the Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation has set up the COVID-19 Emergency Relief Fund to directly support restaurants and restaurant workers. **
[**If you 're in a financially secure place, please show solidarity with restaurant workers across the country by making a donation to the RWCF>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xi6dPwhlqiWc-i4wbyb8MU6x4SJqX5O_D4R4Ui1VOX0=/W0Ge6U40ofiLzeb_GKQKYEZTdJDgaSxeNKR3AeU6gw4=?refcode=X_033020_RWCF_B)
[_****_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xi6dPwhlqiWc-i4wbyb8MU6x4SJqX5O_D4R4Ui1VOX0=/MwCC07-6Z99To5F3y8owzd6zmXO5HDxv2IR90qE4omg=?refcode=X_033020_RWCF_B)
The Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation is an advocacy and action nonprofit created by and for restaurant workers. Every donation to RWCF's relief fund will directly help individual restaurant workers and non-profit organizations affiliated with food industry workers, along with providing zero-interest loans for restaurants to get back up and running.
[**Will you support the RWCF 's efforts and help restaurant workers nationwide?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xi6dPwhlqiWc-i4wbyb8MU6x4SJqX5O_D4R4Ui1VOX0=/W0Ge6U40ofiLzeb_GKQKYEZTdJDgaSxeNKR3AeU6gw4=?refcode=X_033020_RWCF_B)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Yesterday, my team sent out an email on the Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation's COVID-19 Emergency Relief Fund. Did you get a chance to read it? In short, we're asking those who can to make a donation to help restaurants and restaurant workers nationwide. I don't need to tell you that our current health crisis has been detrimental for small, independent business owners -- restaurants included. Read more below ⬇️⬇️ \---------- Forwarded message --------- ** All across the United States, restaurants are being hit hard by the economic side effects of coronavirus. With thousands of restaurants temporarily closed and restaurant employees subsequently laid off, many in the food service industry need help to stay afloat. That 's why the Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation has set up the COVID-19 Emergency Relief Fund to directly support restaurants and restaurant workers. The Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation is an advocacy and action nonprofit created by and for restaurant workers. Every donation to RWCF's relief fund will directly help individual restaurant workers and non-profit organizations affiliated with food industry workers, along with providing zero-interest loans for restaurants to get back up and running. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you and stay well, \-- Team S anchez = = For more information about COVID-19, including official updates, please visit =** Paid for by Stand with Sánchez Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Dietzen
subject: Weekly Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/58774b3cdf97f59e/d061c832a0f9d3f8c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Date: March 30, 2020 | |
---
**Free Lunch Program**

With all traditional campaign events canceled due to COVID-19, it is time to step in and help our Hoosiers where there is a need. It is important for all of us to do our part to stop the spread of COVID-19 and to check on those who may be compromised or doing without during this difficult time.
I spent my week working with Tinker Street, a once thriving downtown restaurant now closed for business due to the virus, Big T’s Auto Parts, LLC and The People Helping Network to distribute over 3,000 free lunches to the apartments on the westside of Indianapolis as well as the homeless in downtown Indianapolis. It was good to know that children dependent on school lunches are not going without during this time.

Our efforts had overwhelming support in the form of “God bless you,” many smiles, and donations which ranged anywhere from $100 bills to the $1 bill from a homeless man appreciative of the lunch.
|
---
**Indiana Rural Vitality Plan**
Indiana’s 5th District Hoosier farmers are critical to American prosperity. In celebration of National Ag Week, I released my plan, which supports the tax cuts and jobs act, and includes the repeal of the death tax, cutting burdensome regulations, and investing in rural broadband and infrastructure.
Please click on the link to read the full plan:
[https://www.drchuckforcongress.com/dr-chuck-dietzen-republ.../](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/58774b3cdf97f59e/0109373522a52602c3d6b838967d376c/33363)
|
---
**Next week we will premiere our new ad and have details on upcoming virtual events with Dr. Chuck. Stay tuned!**

**Stay in touch!**

name: Preston, Team MJ Hegar
subject: FWD: A chart for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've had to change plans and strategies on the fly.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff9/1984618441/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, just wanted to make sure you saw Taylor's message. **We 've got an end-of-quarter goal of $75,000 and the deadline is coming up _tomorrow._** This is the first end-of-quarter goal for the runoff, and we need to show Texans just how strong our campaign is.

As Taylor says, with in-person campaigning suspended, grassroots efforts -- including online donations -- will be key to winning this runoff and coming out ready to take on Sen. Cornyn. **[Check out what she had to say, and then donate to help us hit our goal!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------

Sender: Taylor Klos (mjfortexas.com)
Subject: Quarterly goal met? Not yet.
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> ---
> Hey Peter, as you can see, **we haven 't hit our end-of-quarter goal yet. The good news is we still have time.**
>
> The coronavirus pandemic has shaken a lot of things up for our campaign. To keep Texans safe and healthy, we've had to suspend our in-person events and shift to digital campaigning for the foreseeable future.
>
> **[That means that right now, we're relying on grassroots online donors to help MJ win this runoff and go on to beat Sen. Cornyn. We need to hit our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal by Tuesday. Can you chip in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
> Our campaign has had to change plans and strategies on the fly, but we know that's nothing compared to the struggles of families across Texas whose lives have been upended by this pandemic. If you can't donate right now, we understand.
>
> **[If you are able to pitch in (even a few bucks)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true"), it could make all the difference as we prepare to win the runoff in July and send Sen. John Cornyn packing in November.
>
> We've met our last few quarterly goals, and with your help we know we can raise $75,000 by Tuesday's deadline to do it again.
>
> [Let's make it happen.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
> \-- Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director
>
>
>
> **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dff8/1984618441/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200330.2nd__1139__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dfff/1984618441/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1139&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d6/7f51f7bc/4ce9c508/4ef1dffe/1984618441/VEsP/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: China's lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
The Chinese Communist party is lying about the global pandemic that has taken the lives of thousands of Americans. They blocked the United States from sending experts to Wuhan to study this disease.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42146003&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjk3MTE3MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

The Chinese Communist party is lying about the global pandemic that has taken the lives of thousands of Americans.

They blocked the United States from sending experts to Wuhan to study this disease.

They have even expelled foreign journalists and threatened to shut down our access to necessary medical supplies.

**We must all remember that this virus was made worse by the Chinese Communist Party 's lies. The blame for this global pandemic rests solely on their shoulders.**

Yesterday, I was on Fox News to talk about this pandemic.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIxNDYwMDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjk3MTE3MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**[**Play**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDIxNDYwMDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjk3MTE3MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Despite what the media is reporting, China does not have this virus under control. They recently shut down movie theaters after reopening them. And one morgue in Wuhan reportedly ordered more urns in two days than the Chinese Communist Party has reported total deaths in the whole country.

I have been leading the fight to expose the Chinese Communist Party and their cover up of the global pandemic we are facing.

I will continue to keep you and the American people informed as we face this growing global pandemic.

In service,

Tom Cotton

_

_ __ __

| Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

name: Team Booker
subject: We will get through this together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Dear Friends, All of us on Team Booker are thinking of you and your family during this challenging time and we hope that you are staying healthy and safe. Cory has been working around the clock to secure crucial aid for workers, families, small businesses, hospitals, frontline healthcare providers, and patients impacted by this crisis. This national emergency and his tireless efforts on our behalf are a stark reminder of how much is at stake and why having Cory's voice in the Senate is so important. With Cory's re-election in just seven months, like everyone across the nation, our campaign has had to adapt to protect the safety of our team members, volunteers, and the community. This is why, now more than ever, we need your help. If you are in a position to give at this time, will you consider supporting Cory now ahead of our FEC Filing Deadline tomorrow night, March 31st at 11:59 p.m.? You can contribute online here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200330-eoq](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f82/5fca0d19/7a71a979/291d18c2/812329961/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200330-eoq")** Social distancing has not dented our resolve or eroded our passion for this campaign and we know that we will come through this together. Please stay safe. Team Booker

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
[unsubscribe](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f82/5fca0d19/7a71a979/291d18c1/812329961/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe")

| Rob,
As you've likely heard me say over the last few weeks, now is not the time for partisan politics. We must be united as Texans and Americans to help each other during this COVID-19 epidemic.
Even though I've put partisan politics on hold, the truth of the matter is that we are still in the middle of an incredibly competitive campaign for Congress, and tomorrow night at 11:59PM is our critical end of quarter fundraising deadline.
---
| | | [STAND WITH US](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SElTEj0tUO9C2hGoUFNSzRyPNfvTHRT3gD6bvDprGz0OyvrNYGBM1uOMvQIYuoNK3msa8kqCszyXJqVgFrJ2csgPnFhoYD4RwApm6elZpBfIwUB1ckjutP4ezR-yvU0-PBoxrj1vtfQWTqzxEPoasyXUvjkN5LaPTu1soVXU011h7EmXHcQhgA==&c=n4HMAWzGDLijQoAoAj0yo0B39yJ6iLkP4oyXbxLCl5UNByWrzf_JLQ==&ch=e5koHtTa8AOw9Vx0rFs6c5bcRvbWXEo7G94QQ6o5anSO0gE4ajsE3g==)

| I know that many Texans are hurting right now and worried about how they're going to cover life's expenses. They have been laid off, had their hours cut, or are employers who are struggling to make payroll.
Please only [contribute to my campaign's end of quarter efforts](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SElTEj0tUO9C2hGoUFNSzRyPNfvTHRT3gD6bvDprGz0OyvrNYGBM1uOMvQIYuoNK3msa8kqCszyXJqVgFrJ2csgPnFhoYD4RwApm6elZpBfIwUB1ckjutP4ezR-yvU0-PBoxrj1vtfQWTqzxEPoasyXUvjkN5LaPTu1soVXU011h7EmXHcQhgA==&c=n4HMAWzGDLijQoAoAj0yo0B39yJ6iLkP4oyXbxLCl5UNByWrzf_JLQ==&ch=e5koHtTa8AOw9Vx0rFs6c5bcRvbWXEo7G94QQ6o5anSO0gE4ajsE3g==) if you feel that you are in a comfortable enough financial position to do so. You and your family come first.
[We have an ambitious fundraising goal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SElTEj0tUO9C2hGoUFNSzRyPNfvTHRT3gD6bvDprGz0OyvrNYGBM1uOMvQIYuoNK3msa8kqCszyXJqVgFrJ2csgPnFhoYD4RwApm6elZpBfIwUB1ckjutP4ezR-yvU0-PBoxrj1vtfQWTqzxEPoasyXUvjkN5LaPTu1soVXU011h7EmXHcQhgA==&c=n4HMAWzGDLijQoAoAj0yo0B39yJ6iLkP4oyXbxLCl5UNByWrzf_JLQ==&ch=e5koHtTa8AOw9Vx0rFs6c5bcRvbWXEo7G94QQ6o5anSO0gE4ajsE3g==) in order to take this seat back and turn it red, but like so many Texans right now, we will find a way to make do with less if necessary.
[If you can contribute, please remember that we have a huge deadline at 11:59PM on March 31st](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SElTEj0tUO9C2hGoUFNSzRyPNfvTHRT3gD6bvDprGz0OyvrNYGBM1uOMvQIYuoNK3msa8kqCszyXJqVgFrJ2csgPnFhoYD4RwApm6elZpBfIwUB1ckjutP4ezR-yvU0-PBoxrj1vtfQWTqzxEPoasyXUvjkN5LaPTu1soVXU011h7EmXHcQhgA==&c=n4HMAWzGDLijQoAoAj0yo0B39yJ6iLkP4oyXbxLCl5UNByWrzf_JLQ==&ch=e5koHtTa8AOw9Vx0rFs6c5bcRvbWXEo7G94QQ6o5anSO0gE4ajsE3g==). body:

| Indiana Republicans,

Thank you for hunkering down and keeping each other safe! Have you cleaned your entire home? Organized all your closets? Run out of things to do yet? We get it -- you need to talk to your fellow Hoosiers and continue making a difference (and you _are_ making a difference by staying home!).

**That's why we've got the perfect opportunity this Wednesday for you to support Governor Holcomb and our entire Republican team from the comfort of your own home!**

**This Wednesday, April 1 from 5 p.m. - 8 p.m., you're invited to join your Indiana Republican Party for our Virtual Phone Bank!**

[Sign up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d16ae71ce&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will reach out and get you connected with the easy-to-use technology to help you phone bank from home!
[**\-- > Click here to sign up for the Indiana GOP Virtual Phone Bank! <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54ecd76335&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Stay home, stay safe, and let's continue to work toward more Republican victories this November!

-Your Indiana Republican Party

name: Christy Smith
subject: My sense of purpose has never been clearer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

Peter,

I never expected that I would be running for Congress in the midst of a global pandemic (I don't think anyone would). You'd think that might be overwhelming, but if anything, it's made me even more clear-eyed about this campaign.

What's at stake has never been more obvious. From people losing their jobs, owners of small businesses closing their doors, and families figuring out how to put food on the table, times are tough. Not to mention, the urgent need of getting critical supplies to the heroes in the medical field who are risking their lives every day to save the lives of others. We need our government to be working every day to stop the spread of this virus and mitigate the short- and long-term economic impacts.

But the truth is, I'm always striving to help others out, in good times and in bad. Our elected leaders should always be lifting others up and giving them a hand when needed -- because we're stronger when we're all succeeding.

**[Help me be that voice by pitching in $5 or whatever you can afford before our end-of-quarter deadline.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcac/2443784012/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcad/2443784012/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcae/2443784012/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcaf/2443784012/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbca8/2443784012/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbca9/2443784012/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcac/2443784012/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full")
My career has been built around helping others -- because I got so much support when I was growing up teetering on the edge of poverty, at times facing food and housing insecurity. My family was lucky to get the help we needed -- and I try to help everyone I can in return.

Right now, various problems and needs across the country are coming to light. Too many people still don't have health insurance, wages are so low that families can't weather a small crisis let alone a big one like this, the lack of universal paid sick leave puts us _all_ at risk.

But unlike the outbreak, these issues won't go away when the virus dies down. We need leaders who will **always** serve to help people, not just during a pandemic when the pressure is on.

We can make this happen, but if I am going to make it to Congress, we **have** to stay on track. We're two days out from our final FEC deadline before the special election, so the pressure is on.

**[We can't afford to miss this crucial target. Chip in right now to make sure we meet our end-of-quarter deadline so we can keep fighting for everyone, every single day.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcac/2443784012/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full")**

Thank you,

Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbcac/2443784012/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq3-full")

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e4/29776869/a1b9ba8/569fbca4/2443784012/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 🗽WATCH: President Trump sends USNS Comfort to New York
body:
The USNS Comfort arrived in New York today three weeks ahead of schedule, to begin treating patients tomorrow to help relieve the city’s hospitals. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8aff3d8dd9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 30, 2020
---
| | |
# **🗽****WATCH: President Trump sends USNS Comfort to New York**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=faba728605&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The USNS Comfort** arrived in New York Harbor today three weeks ahead of schedule, where it will begin treating patients tomorrow to help relieve the city’s hospital capacity.

**President Trump** visited Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia over the weekend, seeing off the hospital ship as it embarked for New York City.

**“I’m here** to express my profound gratitude to the dedicated service members who will soon be on the frontlines of this fight,” he said.

“**This great ship** behind me is a 70,000-ton message of hope and solidarity to the incredible people of New York—a place I know very well, a place I love. We’re here for you, we’re fighting for you, and we are with you all the way, and we always will be.”

[Watch the USNS Comfort arrive in New York City!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3693257d62&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump extends Coronavirus Guidelines through April 30**
---
| **Speaking from** the Rose Garden last night, President Trump thanked Americans for their selflessness in helping contain the spread of Coronavirus over the past few weeks. These efforts have saved—and will continue to save—countless American lives.

**“You’re making** the difference,” he said.

**The President** also shared news from the public health experts on his White House Coronavirus Task Force. Modeling put together by Dr. Deborah Birx and Dr. Anthony Fauci suggest that the nationwide mitigation measures put in place may be significantly reducing the number of new infections and the number of fatalities from Coronavirus.

**President Trump:**[On this National Doctors Day, America is grateful! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d3a5bf095&e=3ee4985eea)

**As a result** , “the modeling estimates that the peak in death rate is likely to hit in two weeks,” President Trump said. “Nothing would be worse than declaring victory before the victory is won. That would be the greatest loss of all.”

**To keep this momentum** going in slowing the spread of Coronavirus, the President is extending his nationwide [Coronavirus Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9ab1f1e55&e=3ee4985eea) through April 30.

**“I want every citizen** in our country to take heart and confidence in the fact that we have the best medical minds in the world tackling this disease. We have the best science, the best researchers, and the best talent anywhere working night and day to protect your family and loved ones and to overcome this pandemic.”

**On Friday** , President Trump signed bipartisan legislation to provide emergency relief to American families and workers during the global Coronavirus outbreak.

**The unprecedented relief package** totals more than $2 trillion, including $100 billion for healthcare providers, tax-free direct payments to qualifying American families, and $350 billion in partially forgivable loans for small businesses and nonprofits.

[Read the full transcript of yesterday’s White House Coronavirus briefing.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6941f1b5d4&e=3ee4985eea)

**LEARN MORE** : [President Trump signs unprecedented economic relief bill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b11662932a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump salutes the USNS Comfort as she departs Naval Air Station Norfolk Pier 8 in Virginia en route to New York City **| March 28, 2020
---
|

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Tomorrow at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hey there, Tomorrow at midnight is our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2020. Everything we do between now and the deadline is so important, so I hope you'll give me the chance to explain why. **You see, all of our numbers will be made public for the first time this year, including the amount of money we raised and the number of people who have pitched in to support our campaign.** You can bet Mitch McConnell's super PAC and the Republican dark money network are going to pore over this report, looking for any sign of weakness. Just last week, McConnell's super PAC announced a multi-million dollar advertising spend here in Colorado. With the coronavirus changing our way of life across America, we've had to cancel all of our in-person events, including fundraisers. It was the right and necessary thing to do. But it means reaching our goal before tomorrow's FEC deadline is going to be a challenge -- and we're still behind. I know we can get there if everyone pitches in. **So I 'm asking, will you pitch in $10 or more to our campaign before tomorrow's FEC deadline? Every contribution will make a difference:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200330?refcode=em-200330-explain-a&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: FWD: Health care workers on the frontlines need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| | Hey I wanted to reach out and say thank you. In less than 24 hours, this community rallied to raise $10,000 for Direct Relief, an organization providing masks, gowns, and other PPE to our health care workers on the frontlines. But I know you've seen the headlines: They need more help. So let's rally together and raise another $10,000. Today. Our doctors and nurses are literally wearing trash bags while they save lives. And our President has refused to deploy the Defense Production Act to protect them. So, we're stepping up instead. Donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11ee/3987425738/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief?refcode=2020-03-30-directrelief-o&recurring=1")** Talk soon,
Joe Forwarded Message [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11ef/3987425738/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/") Hey, We hope you are holding up well. Keeping safe. Practicing social distancing. And taking all the necessary precautions. We're sure you've been keeping up on the news, and have seen there is a grave shortage of masks and other essential medical equipment for our frontline health care workers. So we are hoping this community will help out. We did some research and came across an organization called "Direct Relief." Direct Relief is a humanitarian aid organization, active in all 50 states and more than 80 countries, with a mission to improve the health and lives of people affected by poverty or emergencies - without regard to politics, religion, or ability to pay. Right now their biggest focus is providing personal protective equipment -- "PPE" -- to frontline workers across the country. Things like masks, gowns and other gear to keep them safe while they work around the clock to save lives. So, if you are financially able at this difficult time, consider pitching in a few dollars to Direct Relief so they can help manufacture and provide these critical supplies for frontline workers: **Donate to Direct Relief to help provide masks to workers on the frontlines:** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11e8/3987425738/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief?refcode=2020-03-30-directrelief-o&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") After weeks of pressure from Joe and countless Members of Congress across the country, the president finally invoked the Defense Production Act... but hasn't yet called for the production of masks. So in the face of the president's lack of leadership, it's up to us to help ensure our country stays safe. We need more than tweets from our elected leaders. We need action. We need to take care of our own. So far we have raised nearly $30,000 directly for frontline organizations across the country and our campaign has donated nearly $7,000 to charities in Massachusetts. At this moment, we refuse to do nothing. We will continue leveraging every resource we have to help those on the frontlines. We're in this together, and we'll get through this -- together. Keep safe. Team Kennedy **Support Direct Relief** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11e8/3987425738/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief?refcode=2020-03-30-directrelief-o&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") |
---|---|---

---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11e9/3987425738/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900a0/55b66746/238ebaf4/80e11f5/3987425738/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Team Tina
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks — Every day, we’re finding new and creative ways to continue spreading our message across Minnesota and engaging with voters (while practicing social distancing) because this election is so important to the future of our country. We’re taking things day by day. Even though we have to do some things differently, our message remains the same: **Now more than ever, we must come together to tackle the critical issues impacting all of us.** We don’t know how this unprecedented moment will affect our campaign quite yet, which means we’re mustering as many resources as we possibly can now to sustain our operation down the road. The first FEC fundraising deadline of this critical election is tomorrow. Our team would greatly appreciate anything you could chip in between now and then to support our campaign — but only if you are financially able to do so. **So, if it makes sense for you, will you add a donation of $10 (or more) toward our first FEC goal of the year and help us re-elect Tina Smith? clean_body: | Folks — Every day, we’re finding new and creative ways to continue spreading our message across Minnesota and engaging with voters (while practicing social distancing) because this election is so important to the future of our country. We’re taking things day by day. Even though we have to do some things differently, our message remains the same: Now more than ever, we must come together to tackle the critical issues impacting all of us. We don’t know how this unprecedented moment will affect our campaign quite yet, which means we’re mustering as many resources as we possibly can now to sustain our operation down the road. The first FEC fundraising deadline of this critical election is tomorrow. Our team would greatly appreciate anything you could chip in between now and then to support our campaign — but only if you are financially able to do so. So, if it makes sense for you, will you add a donation of $10 (or more) toward our first FEC goal of the year and help us re-elect Tina Smith? Thanks in advance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for any support you can give today. Stay safe and stay healthy. — Team Tina P.S. We know this is a difficult time for everyone, so please stay safe out there. To receive fewer emails during this public health emergency,_ Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| | I want to start this email by saying thank you: Thank you for your support and for being a valued member of this team. I am so humbled by the surge in contributions that we've seen over the course of the past 48 hours. I know a lot of people are hurting right now, and it means so much to me that so many of you would chip in your hard-earned money to support our campaign. I'm comforted knowing that there are folks out there who believe in our fight for Tennessee and are willing to step up to make it possible. [_**We are so close to reaching our FEC goal. name: John Kasich
subject: I want to hear your story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Please take a moment to share your stories with us and we may feature it on my social media accounts. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02b8c8cdcb1d4ef1894f670044339cc5&_e=pV4WqUZMnIcncYVJeBN6y3-4orH1bYgNTlHYGyRr_tbEjnq-mWT_BjBte9Y_2jSjonywIn5z7Em0MAj3wecxnnvJUL9y2H3LVtsna9HYcdwZZ-tB1GgIxiAZc2qUFGx33YBJh2nCbhL85EpzucdbQNVJjksQ09x0NaAr107oFRj_sFfNNhE7BoUL7ECNra5OsSyLN6qA-GNwQ5Pex0thv0NV6yBQlmCpsMT8Toj5GyoVIWJBKJ2oQYJ8yV3dwonRz04ZgLqByl0qSy3RlREyjw%3D%3D) | |
---
In the middle of difficult times, there are reasons for us to be uplifted - to work together and to get back to what America is all about and that's neighbors helping neighbors.

**These stories are happening every day and I want to help share them to give us all something to smile about**.
[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02b8c8cdcb1d4ef1894f670044339cc5&_e=pV4WqUZMnIcncYVJeBN6y3-4orH1bYgNTlHYGyRr_tZoeWv_Vf6dTeQKVS_i2Css9NXG3RPD1CLU7CL3JJcQkfKpE4WaGaXz3sXbmYr7KLdnHAsKItltl546nmLLXfxyDejP6nBPnPpcjtCq3_u-wT-emXD87gMecdOIuNUiTM1jdtQTR6s7aKvkeEJ_eg7mhhnQZHd0vm8GOgleoYK_yGPldJBTQ7pHXp-VvEgnIUET8RYDEa_-q9LJ4Rd3UP6yo1jv2FF1UTYoxJ5PagOHoQ%3D%3D)
Please take a moment to [share your stories with us](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=02b8c8cdcb1d4ef1894f670044339cc5&_e=pV4WqUZMnIcncYVJeBN6y3-4orH1bYgNTlHYGyRr_tZoeWv_Vf6dTeQKVS_i2Css7xIX-TYzUT2A4KZtBUthvwzwALFMdM4gdAUXxtyyDvHUre-taZkcTHXiZiwEBG0HdDCqpsmsVs20HGdgr9sCMrfuVC8_Fqr01IJzBUQHUFrXUcWmtzpS1b7172XbVWh2f-i2UTUNdihIzhGPwJbV6PkrC-YVzHX3tvn46l1nKa5D-tIWB3QaRMvW0vwSl2ei7ChxfLHCJpcIYy58Oq0s5g%3D%3D) and we may feature it on my social media accounts.

Thank you for all that you're doing!

-John

clean_body: Please take a moment to share your stories with us and we may feature it on my social media accounts. | | In the middle of difficult times, there are reasons for us to be uplifted - to work together and to get back to what America is all about and that's neighbors helping neighbors. These stories are happening every day and I want to help share them to give us all something to smile about. Please take a moment to and we may feature it on my social media accounts. Thank you for all that you're doing! -John | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com
